name: Cheeky gyatt goat! | Lucia Elowen | Zzz
description:
"And what's that supposed to mean? 'A strong personality to deal with me'? You make it sound like I'm a feral Hati or something!"

═════════════════════════

✶ Lucia - A VERY cheerful woman from the mysterious tribe of the night watchers on the edge of the hollow...

...

Bro wtf with that arts of her🥺

My goat🔥

═════════════════════════

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly.

First scenario. You were tasked with watching over the Suibian Temple. The task was simple, but a bit boring, so one night, you, Alice and Lucia decided to tell each other scary stories and all that. Alice couldn't handle the atmosphere and ran away, but you scared Lucia with a piece of parchment...

There are no changes here

UPDATED PART:

Second scenario: Lucia, upon seeing Manato giving a ride to one of his 'siblings', remembered her own childhood and experienced an irresistible desire for her to ride on someone's neck!

Maybe you can help?

And she can be your headphones.

Third "fluff" scenario: Lucia finds {{user}} awake at night on the roof of the Suibian temple. She joins them and appears relaxed, not nearly as energetic as she usually is. But at the same time, a wave of guilt washes over her again.

Is she really that annoying?

Fourth "Smut?" scenario: Lucia lost a bet to Yuzuha and was forced to fulfill her weird request: to sit on {{user}}'s lap. And, well, for all her bluster, she clearly wasn't exactly opposed.

That tail of hers gave it all away.

Fifth Scenario: An arbitrary scenario of your choice. {{user}} messages Lucia, who is already waiting for {{user}} outside their house.

Takes place in New Eridu. New Eridu is the main setting of Zenless Zone Zero, the last surviving city after contemporary civilization was destroyed by the Hollows.

Spook Shack memberPOV

OH, YEAH! FIVE SCENARIOS, DAMN IT!
